overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character exploring a vast gothic cathedral interior. The journey transitions from narrow blue-lit corridors through a grand ghostly ballroom and into warm torch-lit halls, showcasing detailed stone architecture and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, misty stone corridor illuminated by blue wall sconces. Gothic arches rise overhead while thick stone pillars line both sides of the marble floor path.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large wooden door at the end of the corridor and opens it, revealing a grand ballroom beyond. The transition moves from the narrow blue corridor into a more open, chandelier-lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ballroom with floating ghostly figures and crystal chandeliers

segments.scene_description: The character explores a vast ballroom filled with floating ghostly figures and illuminated by countless crystal chandeliers. Round dining tables with floral arrangements dot the marble floor while massive stone pillars rise to support the distant ceiling.

segments.scene_description: The character exits the ballroom through a side doorway framed by blue velvet curtains, returning to narrower corridor passages. The environment shifts back to the blue-lit stone architecture with wooden doorways.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a barred iron gate that opens to reveal a corridor with dramatically different warm lighting. The transition marks a shift from the cool blue tones to warm orange torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: warm-lit gothic corridor with statues and chandeliers

segments.scene_description: The character continues through spacious corridors illuminated by warm torchlight and chandeliers. Stone statues stand sentinel along the walls while tapestries and ornate fixtures decorate the gothic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, blue-lit corridor into the expansive brilliance of a ghostly ballroom. It begins with the character walking through a narrow stone passage where misty air clings to gothic arches and blue wall sconces cast a cold glow over the marble floor. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the camera pushes through a large wooden door, transitioning the space from the tight confines of the corridor into a wide, open interior. The scene then expands into a vast ballroom illuminated by countless crystal chandeliers, where the cold blue light shifts to a warmer radiance. Finally, the camera glides past round dining tables and floating ghostly figures, moving between massive stone pillars that stretch toward the distant ceiling.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cool, blue-lit corridor into a grand, torch-lit gothic hall. It begins as the character exits a ballroom through blue velvet curtains, returning to narrow stone passages defined by dim, cool lighting and wooden doorways. As the character approaches a barred iron gate, the gate swings open to reveal a dramatic shift in atmosphere, where the blue tones give way to warm orange light. The scene then expands into spacious corridors illuminated by flickering torchlight and chandeliers, passing by sentinel stone statues and ornate tapestries that decorate the gothic architecture.
